24/7 Emergency Tree Service in Concord, NC

Storm damage, fallen trees, hanging limbs — we respond fast when you need us most. Available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

Call (704) 313-1555 Get Free Estimate

When Storms Hit, We're There

North Carolina storms don't wait for business hours. When a tree falls on your roof, blocks your driveway, or tangles with power lines, you need a crew that responds immediately — not next week. Our emergency team is available around the clock to handle fallen trees, broken limbs, and storm damage across the Concord metro.

Common Emergency Situations

  • Trees fallen on homes, vehicles, or outbuildings
  • Hanging or broken limbs threatening to fall
  • Trees leaning against power lines
  • Storm-split trees that could drop at any time
  • Uprooted trees blocking driveways or roads
  • Trees damaged by lightning strikes

Our Emergency Process

Call us any time — day or night. We'll get basic details about the situation over the phone and dispatch a crew to your location as quickly as possible. Our first priority is making the area safe. We'll stabilize or remove the immediate hazard, then handle full cleanup and removal. We also provide documentation for homeowners insurance claims.

Emergency Tree Removal Costs

Emergency work typically ranges from $500 to $3,000+ depending on the severity, size of the tree, and complexity of the removal. After-hours and weekend calls may include a service premium. Many homeowners insurance policies cover storm damage tree removal — we'll help you document everything for your claim.

Typical Cost

$500 – $3,000+

Exact quotes provided free after on-site assessment.
